title: Nine Suns
content:
The 
Nine Suns
 are the nine most powerful cultivators of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
. Each of them possess a cultivation of at least 
Grand Empyrean
, with one even reaching 
Half Heaven Trampling
.

The 
Celestial Clan
 monopolize 5 of the Nine Suns, putting them ahead of the 
Ancient Clan
 who control the remaining 4. Becoming a Grand Empyrean, and thus a Sun, requires a great fortune which usually comes from the Immemorial God Realm.

Each member of the Nine Suns are able to condense what is known as a 
Grand Empyrean
 sun.

Even though the group is known as the Nine Suns, the people of the Immortal Astral Continent refer to Wang Lin as the Tenth Sun.
